summary: Iteration 11 UI Polish testing complete. All features verified: 1) Booking form fields aligned (VORNAME/NACHNAME same width as TELEFON/UNTERNEHMEN in 2-column grid), 2) All buttons have rounded corners (border-radius applied), 3) Booking modal has border-radius: 12px, 4) Chat modal has border-radius: 12px, 5) Chat trigger button is pill-shaped (border-radius: 50px), 6) Language switcher has premium pill design with active state glow, 7) Chat presets have SVG arrows (no chat_bubble text), 8) Chat LLM responses use markdown rendering, 9) Welcome messages work in DE/EN/NL, 10) All 11 landing page sections render, 11) Admin login works, 12) 3D scenes render (Hero, Process, Globe).
